reasoning: The Lean statement quantifies over all real (b, c) and asserts that the condition "every complex root z of z² + bz + c satisfies |z| < 1" is equivalent to the solution set. The polynomial expression `X^2 + C(b)*X + C(c)` correctly encodes z² + bz + c, `‖z‖ < 1` correctly encodes strictly inside the open unit disk, and the iff structure correctly encodes the "for which ordered pairs" characterization.
